generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. The recent debate about expanding security powers isn't just about control—it's about being prepared. Look at how other nations handle similar situations; they prioritize safety over unnecessary liberties. It's our duty to ensure our country is just as prepared. #SecurityFirst #DutyAndOrder
